name: Estex Suit I
description: A flexible, lightweight suit of armor made from a woven composite polymer, estex is a popular choice for those who want reliable protection without sacrificing agility.
author: Paizo Staff

name: Lashunta Ringwear I
description: Lashunta ringwear is a suit of light armor constructed from overlapping rings of lightweight metal alloy. Developed by the lashunta of Castrovel, ringwear has become popular throughout the Pact Worlds.
author: Paizo Staff
